raw_response:
BOTTLENECK: latency-bound
REASONING: This kernel contains no actual GPU computation—it only calls `cudaDeviceSynchronize()` and `std::puts()`, meaning all execution time is spent on host-side API call latency and synchronization overhead with zero useful work dispatched to the GPU. There are no kernel launches, no memory transfers, and no compute operations, so the bottleneck is purely the latency of the host-side calls and the CUDA runtime synchronization barrier. Any profiling would show idle GPU time dominated by launch/sync latency.
